title: Will I Knew It, I Knew You be 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 in July 2026?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 0%, modal NO) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: The song 'I Knew It, I Knew You' by Taylor Swift was at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 for the second week as of June 22, 2026, which suggests strong momentum. However, there is no direct confirmation of its position as of July 19, 2026.
